title: PRM393 – Ôn tập FE (2 đề: B5 FE + SP26 FE)
subject: PRM393

questions.question: Which widget pattern protects authenticated routes?
questions.explanation: Mẫu Guard (route guard) chặn/cho phép vào route đã xác thực. Navigator chỉ điều hướng; Middleware là khái niệm web/server, không phải widget pattern Flutter chuẩn.

questions.question: Why are tests important for refactoring?
questions.explanation: Test đảm bảo khi refactor, hành vi app không bị hỏng. Không liên quan giảm UI work hay animation.

questions.question: What is the role of BuildContext in Flutter?

options.B: Locate widgets in the widget tree

questions.explanation: BuildContext dùng để định vị widget trong cây, tìm ancestor (Theme, Navigator, MediaQuery…). Không lưu data app hay vẽ pixel.

questions.question: What role does the Flutter framework play in application development?

options.B: It provides UI components and rendering logic

questions.explanation: Flutter cung cấp UI components + engine render. Không thay OS, không chạy backend/DB server.

questions.question: How is the Flutter UI constructed internally?
questions.explanation: UI Flutter được mô tả bằng cây widget phân cấp (widget tree). Không dùng XML/HTML/CSS layout như Android/web cổ điển.

questions.question: Which widget enables custom scroll effects in Flutter?
questions.explanation: CustomScrollView cho phép sliver + hiệu ứng scroll tùy biến. ListView/SingleChildScrollView đơn giản hơn; Column không scroll.

questions.question: Which practice improves rendering performance?
questions.explanation: Tách nhỏ widget giảm rebuild không cần thiết, cải thiện performance. Cây lớn, global state, rebuild liên tục làm chậm.

questions.question: What does an integration test verify?
questions.explanation: Integration test kiểm tra tương tác nhiều phần / hành vi app end-to-end. Unit test = hàm đơn; widget test = render widget.

questions.question: Why is separating UI and state logic recommended?
questions.explanation: Tách UI và state logic giúp bảo trì, test dễ, giảm coupling. Không chủ yếu vì animation hay tốc độ thuần.

questions.question: When does Flutter rebuild the widget tree?
questions.explanation: Flutter rebuild khi state thay đổi (setState, notifyListeners, emit state…). Không rebuild mỗi frame trừ khi animation/ticker yêu cầu.

questions.question: Which concept does BLoC heavily rely on?
questions.explanation: BLoC dựa mạnh trên Stream (event in → state out). Future dùng một lần; không phải Theme/Animation.

questions.question: Why is version control critical?
questions.explanation: Version control theo dõi và quản lý thay đổi mã nguồn, cộng tác, rollback.

questions.question: Why is immutability important in BLoC states?
questions.explanation: State bất biến giúp thay đổi state có thể dự đoán, so sánh dễ, tránh side-effect khi mutate.

questions.question: Which Flutter plugin provides SQLite support?
questions.explanation: sqflite là plugin SQLite phổ biến trên Flutter. Hive = NoSQL local; shared_preferences = key-value đơn giản.

questions.question: What is the main benefit of using Maps in Dart?
questions.explanation: Map trong Dart lưu cặp key-value.

questions.question: Which tool helps analyze UI performance in Flutter?
questions.explanation: Flutter DevTools phân tích performance UI, timeline, memory. Inspector chủ yếu cây widget.

questions.question: What does a Dart class primarily represent?
questions.explanation: Class là bản thiết kế (blueprint) để tạo object — OOP cơ bản.

questions.question: What is the purpose of SliverAppBar?
questions.explanation: SliverAppBar là app bar linh hoạt, co giãn theo scroll trong CustomScrollView.

questions.question: What is Hive mainly used for?
questions.explanation: Hive: lưu trữ NoSQL local nhẹ, nhanh, không cần native SQL bridge nặng.

questions.question: Which HTTP header is commonly used for authorization?
questions.explanation: Header Authorization mang token/credentials. Content-Type mô tả body; Accept chọn response type.

questions.question: What does TextEditingController manage?
questions.explanation: TextEditingController quản lý giá trị và selection của ô text input.

questions.question: Why is Dart considered suitable for Flutter development?

options.A: It is only used for backend systems
options.B: It supports both UI and application logic efficiently
options.D: It does not support asynchronous programming

questions.explanation: Dart hỗ trợ cả logic app và UI (null-safety, async, hot reload) nên phù hợp Flutter.

questions.question: What does the build() method return in a widget?

options.B: A widget tree describing the UI

questions.explanation: build() trả về widget tree mô tả UI cần render, không trả pixel hay state.

questions.question: What represents the output of a BLoC?
questions.explanation: BLoC nhận Events, phát States. Output chính là States.

questions.question: What is Cubit in BLoC?
questions.explanation: Cubit là BLoC đơn giản hơn: emit state trực tiếp, không cần Event class.

questions.question: Which activity is typically performed after creating a new Flutter project?

options.B: Running the default app on a device

questions.explanation: Sau khi tạo project, bước điển hình là chạy app mặc định trên device/emulator để kiểm tra môi trường.

questions.question: Which practice improves deployment security?
questions.explanation: Bảo mật deploy: bảo vệ signing keys, không hardcode secret, dùng release build đã ký.

questions.question: Why is Chapter 14 considered optional (Plus)?

options.B: Apps can be tested without publishing

questions.explanation: Chương deploy thường optional vì có thể test app đầy đủ mà chưa publish store.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of ThemeData in Flutter?
questions.explanation: ThemeData định nghĩa style toàn app (màu, font, component theme).

questions.question: Which method is used to update the UI when state changes?
questions.explanation: setState() đánh dấu StatefulWidget cần rebuild UI khi state đổi. build() được gọi lại; initState/dispose là lifecycle.

questions.question: Which Flutter package is commonly used for simple key-value storage?
questions.explanation: shared_preferences lưu key-value đơn giản (bool/int/string). sqflite cho quan hệ; provider là state management.

questions.question: Why should architecture be decided early?
questions.explanation: Chọn architecture sớm giảm chi phí refactor sau này khi app lớn.

questions.question: What is pagination used for?
questions.explanation: Pagination tải dữ liệu theo trang, xử lý dataset lớn hiệu quả, giảm memory/network.

questions.question: Which widget helps avoid rebuilding unchanged UI parts?
questions.explanation: RepaintBoundary cô lập vùng repaint, tránh vẽ lại phần UI không đổi.

questions.question: Which widget is used to handle asynchronous API responses in UI?
questions.explanation: FutureBuilder lắng nghe Future (API) và rebuild UI theo ConnectionState/data/error.

questions.question: Which Dart feature helps organize code into reusable libraries?
questions.explanation: package + import tổ chức code thành thư viện tái sử dụng.

questions.question: What is refresh token used for?
questions.explanation: Refresh token dùng để lấy access token mới, kéo dài phiên mà không login lại.

questions.question: What is rebuild scope optimization in Flutter?
questions.explanation: Rebuild scope optimization: chỉ rebuild widget bị ảnh hưởng, không rebuild cả cây.

questions.question: Why is BLoC suitable for large teams?
questions.explanation: BLoC chuẩn hóa luồng event/state, dễ phân chia việc trong team lớn.

questions.question: Which widget reacts to async data from local storage?
questions.explanation: FutureBuilder phù hợp data async one-shot từ local storage (Future). StreamBuilder cho stream liên tục.

questions.question: What is a token in authentication systems?
questions.explanation: Token là credential tạm thời chứng minh đã xác thực (JWT, bearer…).

questions.question: What does a Tween define?
questions.explanation: Tween định nghĩa khoảng giá trị bắt đầu–kết thúc cho animation.

questions.question: Which Dart feature allows defining reusable, type-safe components?
questions.explanation: Generics cho component/type-safe tái sử dụng (List<T>, class Box<T>).

questions.question: Which widget animates between two widgets?
questions.explanation: AnimatedSwitcher chuyển động giữa hai child widget khác nhau. Các Animated* khác animate một property.

questions.question: Why should setState() be called sparingly?
questions.explanation: setState() gọi nhiều/không cần thiết gây rebuild thừa → giảm performance.

questions.question: What is test isolation?
questions.explanation: Test isolation: mỗi test case độc lập, không phụ thuộc thứ tự/state test khác.

questions.question: What does crossAxisAlignment control?
questions.explanation: Trong Column (trục chính dọc), crossAxisAlignment điều khiển căn ngang. (Trong Row thì ngược lại.)

questions.question: Which tool is commonly used for version control?
questions.explanation: Git là công cụ version control phổ biến nhất hiện nay.

questions.question: Why is clean architecture beneficial?
questions.explanation: Clean architecture tách layer → dễ bảo trì và kiểm thử. Không chủ yếu vì UI/build nhanh.

questions.question: What is Dart primarily designed for?
questions.explanation: Dart là ngôn ngữ đa mục đích, được tối ưu cho UI client (Flutter).

questions.question: Why is secure authentication critical in mobile apps?
questions.explanation: Xác thực bảo mật nhằm bảo vệ dữ liệu người dùng.

questions.question: Which HTTP method is typically used to retrieve data?
questions.explanation: GET dùng để lấy/retrieve dữ liệu.

questions.question: What happens if a non-nullable variable is not initialized in Dart?
questions.explanation: Biến non-nullable không khởi tạo → lỗi compile-time (null safety).

questions.question: Which command builds a release APK?
questions.explanation: flutter build apk tạo file APK release.

questions.question: Which widget allows overlapping of its child widgets?
questions.explanation: Stack xếp chồng / cho phép overlap child.

questions.question: Which platforms can Flutter applications target using a single codebase?
questions.explanation: Flutter multi-platform: mobile + web + desktop từ một codebase.

questions.question: What is the main risk of improper state management?
questions.explanation: State sai → UI không nhất quán / bug hiển thị.

questions.question: What does Curves/Animation provide?
questions.explanation: Curves định nghĩa đường cong/hành vi animation (easing).

questions.question: How can data be passed to a new screen?
questions.explanation: Cách chuẩn: truyền qua constructor của màn hình mới (hoặc route arguments).

questions.question: What is the purpose of parsing JSON?
questions.explanation: Parse JSON → object/map Dart để dùng trong app.

questions.question: Which phase involves gathering requirements?
questions.explanation: Thu thập yêu cầu thuộc giai đoạn Analysis.

questions.question: Which Flutter tool helps debug network requests?
questions.explanation: Flutter DevTools hỗ trợ debug network, performance, v.v.

questions.question: Which Dart feature supports object-oriented programming?
questions.explanation: OOP trong Dart dựa trên class và object.

questions.question: Which approach helps reduce unnecessary widget rebuilds?
questions.explanation: Cập nhật state hẹp (fine-grained) giảm rebuild thừa.

questions.question: Which action best demonstrates Flutter's reactive UI model?

options.B: Rebuilding UI in response to state changes

questions.explanation: UI reactive: state đổi → rebuild UI.

questions.question: Why are const widgets recommended?
questions.explanation: const widget tái sử dụng instance, giảm chi phí rebuild.

questions.question: Why should animations be disposed properly?
questions.explanation: AnimationController/ticker cần dispose để tránh rò memory.

questions.question: Which Flutter test focuses on UI components?
questions.explanation: Widget test kiểm tra UI components Flutter.

questions.question: Why should database operations be asynchronous?
questions.explanation: DB async để không chặn UI thread.

questions.question: Why is Chapter 13 considered optional (Plus)?

options.B: Apps can work without deep optimization

questions.explanation: Tối ưu sâu (plus) không bắt buộc để app chạy được.

questions.question: Which widget applies a Theme to an entire Flutter application?
questions.explanation: MaterialApp (theme:) áp theme toàn app.

questions.question: What is the purpose of SliverAppBar?
questions.explanation: SliverAppBar: app bar co giãn theo scroll.

questions.question: Which widget is best used to add fixed empty space?
questions.explanation: SizedBox tạo khoảng trống kích thước cố định.

questions.question: Which package supports BLoC architecture?
questions.explanation: Package flutter_bloc hỗ trợ BLoC/Cubit.

questions.question: Which Flutter widget reacts to authentication state changes?
questions.explanation: Auth state dạng stream → StreamBuilder (FutureBuilder cho one-shot).

questions.question: What is technical debt?

options.B: Future cost of poor design decisions

questions.explanation: Technical debt: chi phí tương lai do quyết định thiết kế kém.

questions.question: What is implicit animation?
questions.explanation: Implicit animation (AnimatedOpacity…) không cần AnimationController.

questions.question: Which Dart data structure is best suited for storing an ordered collection of items?
questions.explanation: List: tập hợp có thứ tự.

questions.question: Which Flutter concept supports reactive UI updates?
questions.explanation: Reactive UI dựa trên rebuild widget khi state đổi.

questions.question: Which type of test checks individual functions or classes?
questions.explanation: Unit test kiểm tra hàm/class đơn lẻ.

questions.question: What is the role of events in BLoC?
questions.explanation: Events kích hoạt xử lý → emit state mới.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of hot reload in Flutter?

options.B: Instantly reflect code changes in UI

questions.explanation: Hot reload áp code change lên UI gần như ngay, giữ state.

questions.question: Why are forms important in mobile applications?
questions.explanation: Form dùng thu thập dữ liệu người dùng.

questions.question: Which method retrieves data from SharedPreferences?
questions.explanation: SharedPreferences dùng getString/getInt… (get).

questions.question: What is the main benefit of Flutter's widget-based architecture?

options.A: Widgets are only used for visual design
options.B: Widgets allow code reuse across platforms

questions.explanation: Widget tree + một codebase tái sử dụng qua nền tảng.

questions.question: Why are widgets lightweight in Flutter?
questions.explanation: Widget là mô tả bất biến, nhẹ; Element/RenderObject làm việc nặng.

questions.question: Why should authentication state be centralized?
questions.explanation: Auth tập trung → kiểm soát truy cập nhất quán toàn app.

questions.question: Which widget can hide user input text when configured for password entry?
questions.explanation: TextField với obscureText: true ẩn mật khẩu (ObscureText không phải widget).

questions.question: What is Flutter primarily used for?

options.B: Creating native applications from a single codebase
options.D: Building operating systems for mobile devices

questions.explanation: Flutter: app native-like đa nền tảng từ một codebase.

questions.question: Which method resets all form fields?
questions.explanation: FormState.reset() xóa/reset các field.

questions.question: Which Dart keyword is used to define a constant value at compile time?
questions.explanation: const = hằng compile-time; final = gán 1 lần runtime.

questions.question: What happens after successful login?
questions.explanation: Login thành công → bắt đầu phiên người dùng (session/token).

questions.question: Which step is required before running a Flutter app for the first time?
questions.explanation: Cần cài/setup Flutter SDK trước khi run app.

questions.question: Which widget reacts to async data from local storage?
questions.explanation: Local storage thường trả Future → FutureBuilder.

questions.question: What does golden testing verify?
questions.explanation: Golden test so sánh snapshot giao diện.

questions.question: Why should state be kept as local as possible?
questions.explanation: State càng local càng ít widget bị rebuild oan.

questions.question: What is the benefit of composing widgets in Flutter?

options.B: Better code reuse and UI consistency

questions.explanation: Ghép widget nhỏ → tái sử dụng và UI đồng nhất.

questions.question: Which status code indicates server error?
questions.explanation: 5xx = lỗi server; 500 Internal Server Error.
